author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
The Yoshi and the Mysterious Book game is available now, only on the Nintendo Switch 2 system: https://ninten.do/6000vDvZA 

What discoveries await in this mysterious book? Just see for yourself and take a look! From creatures…habitats…and surprises galore, there’s so much to do and lots to explore! After all, if anyone can help Mr. E, it’s this curious green friend named…Yoshi! 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot
